name: Magic Eden API
what_it_does: Magic Eden REST API — leading multi-chain NFT marketplace API supporting Solana, Bitcoin Ordinals, Ethereum, and Polygon, enabling agents to query NFT listings, floor prices, collections, and execute NFT market analysis and trading workflows.
use_cases: Agents monitoring Magic Eden collection floor prices and listing activity across Solana and Bitcoin Ordinals for trading signals
NFT portfolio tracking — agents querying wallet NFT holdings and valuations across Magic Eden's supported chains
Collection analytics — agents fetching Magic Eden sales volume, holder counts, and trading activity for market research
Rarity and pricing — agents querying individual NFT listings and attributes to assess rarity and fair market price
Marketplace automation — agents monitoring new listings matching specific criteria for automated NFT curation or purchasing
not_for: Non-NFT blockchain data — Magic Eden API is NFT-focused; use Alchemy or Moralis for general blockchain data
Ethereum-heavy NFT workflows — OpenSea has better Ethereum NFT coverage; Magic Eden's strength is Solana and Bitcoin Ordinals
DEX or DeFi operations — Magic Eden is an NFT marketplace, not a DeFi protocol
best_when: You need Solana NFT or Bitcoin Ordinals market data, floor prices, and listing information from the dominant marketplace on those chains.
avoid_when: You're working primarily with Ethereum NFTs — OpenSea has better Ethereum coverage and more mature API.

auth.notes: Public endpoints available without authentication for basic data. API key required for higher rate limits and premium endpoints. Key passed as Authorization Bearer token. Apply for API access via Magic Eden developer portal.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Public endpoints: free with lower rate limits; authenticated tier available via developer program
pricing.paid_tiers: Developer program: apply for higher rate limits; enterprise partnerships for production integrations
pricing.notes: Basic API access is free. Higher rate limits require developer program approval. Magic Eden operates as a marketplace — API is secondary to marketplace operations.

performance.rate_limits: Public: ~60 req/min; Authenticated: higher limits upon approval; no published hard limits

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API with reasonable documentation for public endpoints. Error messages include status codes. Some endpoints may return empty arrays for not-found rather than error codes. Bitcoin Ordinals endpoints are newer and less documented.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: All Magic Eden API endpoints are read-only — fully idempotent. No write operations available via public API. Buy/list operations require wallet transaction signing, not API calls.
known_agent_gotchas: Solana and Bitcoin Ordinals endpoints use different path structures — agents must handle chain-specific URL patterns
NFT buy/sell transactions require wallet signing (not possible via REST alone) — API is read-only for market data
Floor prices update with some lag — for real-time trading, agents should compare multiple data sources
Rate limits for unauthenticated requests are low — apply for developer API key for any production use
Collection slugs differ from display names — agents must look up correct collection identifier before querying

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. No SOC2 or formal compliance certifications. API key auth with no scope granularity. Web3/crypto space with regulatory uncertainty. No GDPR documentation. Developer-focused platform.
